sglang.title: Frontend: better error message handling for FINISH_ABORT in scheduler.py
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
FINISH_ABORT is only used in scheduler.py, and it has is_error=True. Currently, the server only logs error for it but the actual message is not being handled properly to the user.
For instance, when the multi-modality request is too long, it should be propagated back to the user as a 400.

vllm.title: [BUGFIX] Move scores to float32 in case of running xgrammar on cpu
vllm.author: madamczyk-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Running guided decoding with xgrammar backend on CPU fails when dtype is not float32:

ERROR 01-08 04:49:55 engine.py:136]     logits_row = logits_processor(past_tokens_ids,
ERROR 01-08 04:49:55 engine.py:136]   File "/workspace/vllm/vllm/model_executor/guided_decoding/xgrammar_decoding.py", line 26

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix multi-modal processors for transformers 4.48
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the multi-modal processors of Aria, Mantis(LLaVA) and Qwen2-Audio after upgrading to transformers 4.48, while maintaining backwards compatibility. Note that our CI currently uses 4.47.0, so I've only tested this locally.
FIX #12168
